summary: Iteration 15 — Story Quest (interactive W.A.V.E. replay). Created /app/backend/tests/test_story_quest.py — 10/10 pytest pass. Public flow E2E walked through all 12 seeded scenes by picking the FIRST choice each scene → finale rendered with matched character 'Ms Bluegill' (welcome_curiosity dominant), W.A.V.E. fingerprint visible (W=9, A=2, V=0, E=1), badge unlocked ('mr_badges'=['story_quest']) AND a green toast 'Wave badge unlocked: Story Quest Champion!' appeared. Play again, Share, See my badges links all present. /wave-badges shows 'Story Quest Champion'. Header nav-story-quest present; /story page CTA (story-page-quest-cta) present. Admin /admin/story-quest renders all 12 scenes (data-testid scene-row-{n}, scene-edit-{n}, scene-delete-{n} for each), W.A.V.E.→Sea Star mappings (Ms Bluegill / Myrtle the Turtle / Ray the Manta Ray / Ollie the Octopus dropdowns) with mapping-save button, Analytics shows 1 completion today + character distribution + averages. 'New scene' modal opens with Title/Narrative/Bg/Audio/Choices form. Backend regression: all admin CRUD + reorder roundtrip (12 ids reversed then restored) + mappings PUT 400-on-missing-key + analytics shape verified.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'Ride the wave with us' email signup modal pops up mid-quest (observed around scene 8) and overlays the scene-continue button. A child who doesn't dismiss it cannot click 'Continue', breaking the flow. The same popup is already suppressed on /sea-star-studio (iteration 14) — apply the same path whitelist to /story-quest so kids aren't interrupted while playing.

issues: data-testid='quest-progress' has no aria-valuenow / aria-valuemax / aria-valuemin attributes — cosmetic only (the visible progress bar increments correctly through scenes 1→12), but a11y screen-readers won't announce progress. Consider adding aria-valuenow={current} aria-valuemax={12} role='progressbar'.

action_items: MEDIUM: Suppress PopupSignup on /story-quest path (same pattern as /sea-star-studio). Currently the popup blocks the 'Continue' button mid-quest.
LOW: Add aria-valuenow / aria-valuemax to data-testid='quest-progress' for screen-reader accessibility.
critical_code_review_comments: story_quest_router.create_scene: when body.scene_number is provided, the route trusts it as-is and does not shift existing scenes. Two admins could create scenes with overlapping scene_number (no unique index). Consider an upsert that increments siblings, or add a unique index on scene_number with a transaction.
story_quest_router.reorder iterates updates one by one (await per scene_id). For 12 scenes this is fine, but for larger libraries a single bulk_write would be ~10x faster.

story_quest_router.analytics 'today' filter uses `_now_iso()[:10]` as a $gte on a string field — works because ISO timestamps are lexicographically sortable, but is brittle to TZ changes. Safer: compute a true UTC midnight datetime and compare against parsed completed_at.
WAVE_KEYS tuple is duplicated between router and seed.py / frontend. Consider exporting from a shared constants module so a misspelling can't drift.

/api/story-quest/scenes returns up to 50 docs (cur.to_list(50)) — seed has 12 today but if admins create more this could silently truncate. Either remove the cap (return all active) or surface pagination.

Public POST /track-completion takes wave_scores as a free dict — no clamp or upper bound. A malicious client could submit {welcome_curiosity: 999999} and skew analytics. Add per-key range validation (0 ≤ score ≤ 12).

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 story-quest pytest, including admin CRUD + reorder + mappings + analytics)
success_rate.frontend: 95% — public splash→12 scenes→finale→badge end-to-end works; admin page renders all elements correctly; only blocker is PopupSignup interrupting kids mid-quest (workaround: dismiss popup once).

test_credentials: Admin: community@rollingriver.com / Camp1993! (verified via /api/auth/login + admin UI Sign In).
seed_data_creation: No additional seeding needed — 12 scenes and DEFAULT_CHARACTER_MAPPINGS already seeded by /app/backend/seed.py at startup. Tests use autouse cleanup fixture that wipes TEST_-prefixed scenes/completions. One real completion exists in DB now (matched: Ms Bluegill) from the E2E walkthrough.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Quest backend + frontend pass. To replay the public flow, click the FIRST choice on every scene → finale always matches Ms Bluegill (welcome_curiosity dominant). Watch out for PopupSignup which pops up mid-quest on /story-quest — if main agent has fixed the suppression, retest by NOT dismissing the popup. Admin page exposes scene-row-{n}, scene-edit-{n}, scene-delete-{n} testids for each row (1-12). New scene modal title input has no [type='text'] attribute — use input[placeholder] or selector for the dialog's first input.
rca_of_the_issue: PopupSignup interrupts /story-quest: the popup's path whitelist in /app/frontend/src/components/PopupSignup.jsx (or similar) does not include '/story-quest'. Iteration 14 confirmed it correctly suppresses on '/sea-star-studio'. Fix: add '/story-quest' to the same suppression list (or any path beginning with '/story-quest' so /story-quest/scene/... is also covered if it later becomes a sub-route).
